stats.label: Smart India Hackathon 2025 · National Runner-Up / 131 teams

achievements.title: Smart India Hackathon 2025 – National Runner-Up
achievements.description: 2nd place (Bengaluru Grand Finale) among 131 teams. Built Fake IC Detection System.

achievements.title: CodeForces Specialist (1484 rating)
achievements.description: Top 18% globally among 100,000+ active competitive programmers.

achievements.title: Vulnerability Disclosure – TakeUForward
achievements.description: Critical CVSS 7.5/10 flaw affecting 1.25M+ users. Officially acknowledged & patched.

achievements.title: ML Quest Hackathon – 3rd Place
achievements.description: IEEE CIS, GHRCE. Trained ML model to predict flight fares.

achievements.title: GenAI Lead – Google Developer Groups, IIIT Bhopal
achievements.description: Organized workshops with Google Cloud + Hack2skill. 400+ participants.

highlights: Refactored Doctor Listing API using batch aggregation, eliminating N+1 query bottleneck (O(N) to O(1)).
Resolved data visibility bugs by standardizing DB keys and deterministic sorting.
Patched critical Broken Access Control flaw via multi-tenant validation.
Engineered state-aware push notification filtering for WebRTC/Agora sessions.
Created a Real-Time Log Sanitizer in Python preventing secret leaks via regex streaming.
Architected scalable Python (FastAPI) pipelines for LLM-driven video workflows.
Developed Playwright-based headless visualization recorder, slashing AWS costs by >40%.
Identified and mitigated Salary Data Leak & Stored XSS flaws.
Developed custom Python/SQL Inventory Management System saving 20+ hours/week.
Standardized 20+ study materials increasing course ratings.

projects.name: High-Throughput Event-Driven Backend
projects.description: 9,000+ req/sec with P99 < 50ms. Redis Cache-Aside + singleflight preventing cache stampedes. RabbitMQ for write-heavy offloading. 1,000+ concurrent users.

projects.name: Zero-Shot Cross-Lingual Transfer (EN→HI)
projects.description: 67.2% accuracy on Hindi XNLI — beats mBERT baseline by 10.04%. ONNX + Int8 quantization gave 6x latency reduction and 73% model size cut on CPU.

projects.name: Graph-Augmented Two-Tower RecSys
projects.description: 86.0% Recall@10, 82.9% NDCG@10 on 26k+ interactions. GRU + Multi-Head Attention + InfoNCE Loss. Zero-shot retrieval via semantic description matching.

projects.name: Automated Product Decision System
projects.description: 400+ decisions/hr. CI/CD automated via GitHub Actions. Integrated secure JWT-based auth and WebSocket pipelines.

projects.name: pun-nlp — Open Source PyPI Library
projects.description: Unified NLTK/spaCy APIs. 6,500+ downloads. Reduces NLP boilerplate by 30%. Automated testing and CI/CD via GitHub Actions.
